Table B11.14: Prefetcher mode that is determined by CBusy

CBusy[2] CBusy
[1:0] Prefetcher
mode

1 11
Disable inaccurate prefetchers

Can take any value 10
Very conservative mode on inaccurate prefetchers

1 01
Moderately aggressive mode on inaccurate prefetchers

Can take any value 00
Fully aggressive mode on inaccurate prefetchers
